Delhi, the 18th August, 2009 No. 277 R u lesfDHC.--:-In exercise of the power conferred by Sections 122 and 129 of the Code of Civil" Procedur e, 1908 and Section 7 of the Delhi High Court Act, 1966 (Act 26 0(966) and alJ other powers enapling it in lhis behalf, the High Court of Delhi, hereby makes the foH owing amendments in Chapter II of the Delhi High Court (Original Side) Rules, 1967 ;- 1. The following shall be s ubst itute~ for the existing clause (29) ofrule 3 :- "(29 ) To secure the attendance ·ofwitnesses and take proceedings against them for failure to c omply with the summons as provided under Order XVI of the Code and to record '\ evidence and decide objections as to tions in examination-in-chief, cross-exarn~ nation and re-examination." 2. The following shall be substituted for the clause (38) of rule 3 ;- "(38) Applications for enlargement or of time including applications to the right to file the written statements replies or applications seeking extension time for leading evidence and foreclosin2' the right to lead evidence." 3. The following shall be inserted as clauses (56) to in ruld and the existing clause (56) shall be bered as clause (66) ;- "(56) Deal with and decide applications Order I Rule 2 and/or an application Order I Rule 3A and/or Rule 6 ofthe Civil Procedure; !57) Deal with and decide applications Order I Rule 10 of the Code of Civil Proce- dure; (58) Decide applications under Order IT Rule ofthe Code of Civil Procedure; (59) Decide applications seeking discharge the counsel; (60) Decirde application.s seeking exemption filing original' documents along with .pleadings or seeking leave to file documen~ at a lqter stage; (61) ,. Decide applications under Order IX Rule and Rule 7, ofthe Code of Civil Procedure; (62) To register and issue notices/summons suits under Order xxxv n of the Code'and to decide·applications under Order XXXVll of the Code except applications under Order XXXVII Rule 3(5) and Rule 4 of the Code; . . . (63) To decide applications seeking extension of .-time to "file"theCoUl1 fee; (64), 'To pass orders pertaining to renewal of Fixed Deposits where ?loney is deposited ant to an 0rder passed in any proceeding ·a Court·9n the Original Side; (65) To issue notice (not decide) applications ,.
